title: Polymarket Cross-Venue Signals Scientific Collaboration 47
thesis: Use Polymarket microstructure and cross-venue event matching to produce robust paper-only signal layers. This variant fuses bayesian/causal researcher guidance with information theory researcher, econometrics researcher to test causal priors and uncertainty-aware edge filtering; entropy compression, surprise detection, and cross-feed information gain; stability-aware factor combinations and regime-conditioned edge persistence.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
